Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag
This brand-new Gucci Jackie series shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's exquisite craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. The combination of light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and the included strap featuring red and green webbing adds more styling possibilities to this Gucci Jackie small shoulder bag, which is made in the brand's classic red Gucci Rosso Ancora leather.
Model: 782849
Color: Gucci Rosso Ancora Patent Leather
Size: 27.5x19x4cm

items.name_en: 👑Goyard Saigon Mini - The most practical bag 🥇
items.name_cn:
👑Goyard Saigon Mini - The most practical bag 🥇
🌟Beechwood handle + unique silhouette = unforgettable
🌟Cotton-linen fabric and leather patchwork + yellow calfskin lining = exquisite from the inside out.
🌟Perfect strap length, only 250g! Light enough to make you doubt if it's a bag. This is the unique charm of MiniSaigon.
🌟Suitable for any style and occasion, no need to worry about matching. Absolutely stunning.
🌟All the beautiful colors are shared here. A safe bet, no wrong choices.
 Dimensions 21*14.5*9.5CM
Model 8005
